description: An International Relations professor needs a comprehensive organizational chart of the United Nations system for lecture materials. Using the reference file at ~/Desktop/un_system_reference.txt, create a multi-page draw.io diagram at ~/Desktop/un_org_chart.drawio and export it as ~/Desktop/un_org_chart.png. Page 1 ('UN Principal Organs') must feature a 'United Nations' root node connected to the 6 principal organs: General Assembly, Security Council, Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC), International Court of Justice (ICJ), Secretariat, and Trusteeship Council. Include at least 3 subsidiary bodies under the General Assembly (e.g., UNHCR, UNICEF, UNDP, UNEP, WFP, Human Rights Council), 2 under the Security Council (
